name: Mercury
description: Mercury is a modern business banking platform designed for startups and tech companies. The API provides access to accounts, transactions, recipients, invoicing, treasury, webhooks, and organizational data, enabling automated treasury management and financial operations.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all bank accounts associated with your Mercury organization.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific bank account.

capabilities.name: accounts_cards_list
capabilities.description: List all debit cards associated with a specific account.

capabilities.name: accounts_statements_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve account statements for a specific bank account.

capabilities.name: accounts_internal_transfer_create
capabilities.description: Create an internal transfer between two Mercury accounts.

capabilities.name: transactions_list
capabilities.description: List transactions for a specific account with optional date and status filters.

capabilities.name: transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific transaction.

capabilities.name: transactions_list_all
capabilities.description: List all transactions across all accounts in the organization.

capabilities.name: transactions_update
capabilities.description: Update metadata on a transaction such as notes or categories.

capabilities.name: transactions_send
capabilities.description: Send money to a saved recipient via ACH or wire transfer.

capabilities.name: transactions_attachment_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file attachment to a transaction.

capabilities.name: recipients_list
capabilities.description: List all saved payment recipients.

capabilities.name: recipients_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific payment recipient.

capabilities.name: recipients_create
capabilities.description: Create a new payment recipient with bank account details.

capabilities.name: recipients_update
capabilities.description: Edit an existing payment recipient's information.

capabilities.name: recipients_attachment_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file attachment to a recipient record.

capabilities.name: recipients_attachments_list
capabilities.description: List all file attachments across all recipients.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List all accounts receivable invoices.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a new accounts receivable invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing invoice's details.

capabilities.name: invoices_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an existing invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_attachments_list
capabilities.description: List all attachments for a specific invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_pdf_download
capabilities.description: Download the PDF version of an invoice.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all accounts receivable customers.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new accounts receivable customer.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific customer.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer's information.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an accounts receivable customer.

capabilities.name: categories_list
capabilities.description: List all transaction categories.

capabilities.name: credit_list
capabilities.description: List all credit accounts and credit lines.

capabilities.name: organization_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about your Mercury organization.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List all events in your organization.

capabilities.name: events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific event.

capabilities.name: statements_pdf_download
capabilities.description: Download an account statement as a PDF.

capabilities.name: treasury_list
capabilities.description: List all treasury investment accounts.

capabilities.name: treasury_transactions_list
capabilities.description: List transactions for treasury accounts.

capabilities.name: treasury_statements_list
capabilities.description: List statements for treasury accounts.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in your Mercury organization.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific user.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all registered webhook endpoints.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific webhook endpoint.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook endpoint configuration.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook endpoint.

capabilities.name: webhooks_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a webhook endpoint by confirming its reachability.
